pre_capture_js: (async function() { function delay(ms) { return new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, ms); }); } function click(el) { el.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent("click", {bubbles: true, cancelable: true})); } function walkText(root) { var walker = document.createTreeWalker(root, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT); var text = ""; var node; while (node = walker.nextNode()) { var p = node.parentElement; if (p && (p.tagName === "STYLE" || p.tagName === "SCRIPT")) continue; var t = node.textContent.trim(); if (t.length > 1) text += t + " "; } return text.replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim(); } var allFpn = document.querySelectorAll("floorplan-navigator"); var fpn1 = null; var fpn2 = null; allFpn.forEach(function(f) { if (f.classList.contains("fpn-modal")) { fpn1 = f; } else { fpn2 = f; } }); if (!fpn1) fpn1 = allFpn[0]; if (!fpn1 || !fpn1.shadowRoot) return; var sr1 = fpn1.shadowRoot; var sr2 = fpn2 ? fpn2.shadowRoot : null; var floors = sr1.querySelectorAll("li.unit-filters__floor"); if (!floors.length) return; var allResults = []; for (var i = 0; i < floors.length; i++) { click(floors[i]); await delay(1500); var svgUnits = sr1.querySelectorAll(".unit--available-on"); for (var j = 0; j < svgUnits.length; j++) { click(svgUnits[j]); await delay(2000); if (sr2) { var detail = walkText(sr2); if (detail.length > 10) { var cleaned = detail.split("Enlarge")[0].trim(); if (cleaned.length > 5) allResults.push(cleaned); } } } } if (allResults.length > 0) { var div = document.createElement("div"); div.id = "collegewest-units"; div.textContent = allResults.join("\n---\n"); document.body.appendChild(div); } })()
